build.buildCommand: if [ "$RAILWAY_SERVICE_NAME" = "morlo-web" ] || [ "$RAILWAY_SERVICE_NAME" = "makeyourmusic-web" ]; then npm install --prefix shared && npm install --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix frontend; else cd backend && npm install && npx prisma generate --schema=../prisma/schema.prisma && npm run build; fi

deploy.startCommand: if [ "$RAILWAY_SERVICE_NAME" = "morlo-web" ] || [ "$RAILWAY_SERVICE_NAME" = "makeyourmusic-web" ]; then cd frontend && npm start -- -p $PORT; else cd backend && npx prisma migrate deploy --schema=../prisma/schema.prisma && npm start; fi
